canonical_text: Nine companies (Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Facebook, IBM, Apple, Baidu, Alibaba, Tencent) control AI's future
subject: Amy Webb
verdict: Missed OpenAI, Anthropic, Nvidia, DeepSeek — field expanded well beyond nine players

canonical_text: US-China AI competition is the defining geopolitical dynamic of the AI era
subject: Amy Webb
verdict: Validated by chip export controls, DeepSeek competition, and TikTok tensions

canonical_text: IBM is one of the nine most important companies in AI
subject: Amy Webb
verdict: Watson was shuttered; IBM is irrelevant in frontier AI as of 2026

canonical_text: Without governance intervention, AI development trends toward catastrophic outcomes
subject: Amy Webb
verdict: EU AI Act passed but US governance remains fragmented; outcome unclear
